common.privacyGuarantee: Your privacy is guaranteed. No public profiles. No leaderboards. No peer comparison. Ever.

languageSelector.heading: Choose Your Language
languageSelector.subheading: Select the language you'd like to use

welcome.message2: Work on meaningful projects alongside your studies — verified by your university.
welcome.message3: Earn PoDL credentials that prove what you can actually do.

profile.title: Set Up Your Profile
profile.displayNamePlaceholder: How you'd like to be known

verify.title: Verify Your University Email
verify.description: We'll send a verification code to your university email address. Enter it below to continue.

skills.title: Select Your Skills
skills.instruction: Choose the skills you have or want to develop. You can always add more later.

activation.title: You're All Set!
activation.message: Your account is ready. Start discovering tasks and building your credentials.
activation.step1: Browse available tasks that match your skills
activation.step2: Accept a task and submit your evidence of delivery

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.discoverDescription: Find tasks that match your skills and start building credentials.
dashboard.credentialsDescription: Review and export your Proof-of-Delivery credentials.

credentials.title: Credentials
credentials.noCredentials: Complete tasks to earn PoDL credentials.

team.title: Team
team.description: Your team members are shown anonymously to protect everyone's privacy.
team.noTeam: You're not currently assigned to a team.

skills.title: Skill Genome
skills.description: Track your private skill growth. Your skills are never shared publicly.
skills.noSkills: Complete deliveries to start building your skill genome.

alumni.title: Reactivate Your Account
alumni.subtitle: Welcome back! Your PoDL history will be preserved.

governor.title: Strategic Governor
governor.subtitle: Aggregated institutional overview. Individual data never shown.
governor.toggleCategories: Toggle categories your institution participates in
